Performance Parameters

DirectMusic lets you control many aspects of track behavior by changing parameters during playback. The IDirectMusicPerformance8::SetGlobalParam method enables you to set values that apply across the entire performance.

The equivalent GetParam and GetGlobalParam methods retrieve current values for a track or the performance.

More information about parameters is contained in Setting and Retrieving Global Parameters
